name: iubenda Consent Solution API
description:
The Consent Database HTTP API allows you to record and retrieve consent actions performed by your users, who will be referred to within the solution as 'subjects'. It provides endpoints for managing consents, subjects, legal notices, and proof documents.

Rate Limits: 50 requests per second, 108,000 requests per hour. Max request size: 1 MB per call. Only UTF-8 encoded JSON is supported.
